mapper.select: SELECT p.prodNo, p.cateId, p.prodName, p.description, p.maker, p.deliveryFee, p.price, p.discount, p.point, p.sold, COALESCE(SUM(pv.stock), 0) AS stock, parent.cateId AS rootCategoryId, parent.name AS rootCategoryName, c.name AS subCategoryName, p.thumb1FileId, p.thumb2FileId, p.thumb3FileId, p.detailInfoFileId, p.sellerUid, p.infoNoticeType, p.createdAt FROM product p LEFT JOIN category c ON c.cateId = p.cateId LEFT JOIN category parent ON parent.cateId = c.parentId LEFT JOIN product_variant pv ON pv.prodNo = p.prodNo WHERE p.prodNo = #{prodNo} GROUP BY p.prodNo, p.cateId, p.prodName, p.description, p.maker, p.deliveryFee, p.price, p.discount, p.point, p.sold, parent.cateId, parent.name, c.name, p.thumb1FileId, p.thumb2FileId, p.thumb3FileId, p.detailInfoFileId, p.sellerUid, p.infoNoticeType, p.createdAt

SELECT COUNT(prodNo) FROM product p
sellerUid = #{seller}
AND CAST(p.prodNo AS CHAR) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND p.prodName LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM member m WHERE m.uid = p.sellerUid AND m.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
